authority_surfaces.text_excerpt:
# Control Window Architecture Adoption Packet
## Authority Reference: Phase 0 — Governance Source-of-Truth Reconciliation

**Document type**: architecture_adoption_packet  
**Authority scope**: Phase 0 authority surface reconciliation  
**Version**: 1.0  
**Status**: active

---

## Authority Surfac

conflicts.description: current_phase.json reports current_phase_id=0 (governance_source_of_truth_reconciliation, open) but next_package_class.json reflects Phase 7 closure (current_allowed_class=ratification_only). Phase 0 has been procedurally bypassed without a formal closure record.
phase_gate_status.json shows Phase 0 as 'open' while Phase 7 is 'closed_ratified'. Phases 1-7 were closed without Phase 0 (governance_source_of_truth_reconciliation) receiving a closure record.
config/promotion_manifest.json (legacy tactical release authority) still exists on disk. Migration is explicitly deferred per phase_gate_status.json followup note.

LEDT campaign is complete (ledt_campaign_complete verdict in artifacts/) but no governance authority surface reflects the local-exec-default transition. As noted in handoff V7: LEDT modules are capability_session class and may be ratified without tactical-family unlock.

recommended_authority_order.label: revised_target_architecture_handoff_v7
recommended_authority_order.rationale: V7 handoff is the most current external authority declaration; defines the reconciliation order.

recommended_authority_order.label: canonical_roadmap
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Defines the phase structure all other surfaces reference; must be verified first.

recommended_authority_order.label: phase_gate_status
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Per-phase gate classifications are the reconciliation surface for Phase 0 closure.

recommended_authority_order.label: current_phase
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Should be advanced to reflect Phase 0 closure once closure evidence is ratified.

recommended_authority_order.label: next_package_class
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Allowed package class derives from current phase; update after current_phase is reconciled.

recommended_authority_order.label: runtime_contract_version
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Phase 1 hardening requires explicit ratification; downstream of Phase 0 closure.

recommended_authority_order.label: tactical_family_classification
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Family unlock criteria depend on phase authority being correct; after Phase 0/1.

recommended_authority_order.label: schema_contract_registry
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Schema active/frozen classification is stable; update as new modules are adopted.

recommended_authority_order.label: promotion_manifest_legacy
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Formally retire or migrate after Phase 0/1 authority surfaces are closed.

phase0_gate_status.blocking_reason: machine-readable authority artifacts are being introduced by RECON-W1 and have not yet been ratified as closed
phase0_gate_status.assessment: OPEN — Phase 0 has no closure record. The governance_source_of_truth_reconciliation phase requires an explicit closure package before the authority surface inventory is considered fully ratified.
